class.name: CassieBeautifier
class.brief_description: Single-call entry point that runs the full CASSIE beautify pipeline.
class.description: Takes a raw [CassieInputStroke] and a [CassieSketchContext] (existing strokes + mirror plane), runs RDP simplification and Schneider's recursive cubic Bezier fitter, detects intersection / mirror constraints, and resolves the constrained system via [CassieConstraintSolver].

method.name: beautify
method.description: Returns a [Dictionary] with at least the keys: [code]curve[/code] (a [Curve3D] or [code]null[/code]), [code]intersections[/code], [code]mirror_constraints[/code], [code]applied_anchors[/code], [code]rejected_count[/code], [code]planar[/code], [code]is_closed_loop[/code], [code]is_valid[/code], and [code]is_short_or_linear[/code]. When [param fit_to_constraints] is [code]false[/code] the solver step is skipped and only the fitted curve is returned.
